Elite Locker – 24" Wide, 76 Inches High, 19 Inches Deep

Model # ELIT-24-MP

Lead time: usually ships within 2–4 weeks (Quick Ship)

$599.00
24" (standard)
Maple

Custom colors are available upon request (custom orders, 8–12 weeks).

Laminate & wood finishes included

Standard laminate and wood options for this locker. For custom orders we can match your specific color.

Open full sheet in new tab

Laminate — Smooth · Full range

Wood — Stained · Full range

Select add-ons to update price

Standard size shown: 24" W x 76" H x 19" D

Base: optional 4" high base can be added

Weight: approx. 175 lbs

Volume Discounts

Quantity Price
50 + lockers 3–5% discount – Contact us for pricing

Elite Wood Locker – Features & Options

Features

  • Curved design with premium plywood core and melamine or equivalent surface
  • Quick Ship: 2–4 weeks in 24" or 30" widths, Light Grey or Dark Grey
  • High scratch resistance and impact durability; moisture-resistant, dimensionally stable
  • Engineered for elite and professional facilities and high-traffic athletic locker rooms
  • 14" high foot locker provides comfortable seating and secure equipment storage
  • Available in 18" to 30" widths; standard configuration 24" W x 76" H x 19" D with optional 4" base
  • Custom orders (8–12 weeks): any size, any wood, or materials; custom colors upon request
  • Lifetime guarantee

Options

  • Choice of finishes: black, light grey, dark grey, or maple
  • Vented front panel for increased airflow
  • Secure lock box integrated into the upper compartment
  • Bottom cushion or both cushions for added seating comfort
  • Skate hooks for hockey or figure skating storage
  • Custom logo option for teams or programs (custom orders only; not available for quick ship)
  • Name plate and additional gear hooks

Downloads

  • Request spec sheet & quote
  • Installation support
  • View all lockers

PlayerStall

Premium wood lockers at unbeatable prices. Quick ship in 2–4 weeks (Stadium & Elite) or custom wood, phenolic & more in 8–12 weeks. Price match guarantee. 30+ years experience.
